description: As an admin user, I want to log in to the OrangeHRM system so that I can access the Dashboard. [cite: 17, 18]

steps.name: Given  User is on the OrangeHRM login page
When  User enters valid username and password
And  Clicks on the login button
Then  User should be redirected to the Dashboard page [cite: 19]
